{
  "judge_id": "JUDGE-1",

    "R1.2": "The output identifies and addresses every load-bearing inconsistency in the argument chain.",

    "RX.1": "The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.",
    "RX.3": "Mostly within scope with one drift (excluded games not explicitly reported in the headline claim).",

rationale.R1.2: The output identifies and addresses every load-bearing inconsistency in the argument chain.
rationale.R1.3: The output audits every load-bearing claim against the corresponding table/figure.
rationale.RX.1: The output flags uncertainty for one or two clearly out-of-reach claims.
rationale.RX.3: Mostly within scope with one drift (excluded games not explicitly reported in the headline claim).
rationale.RX.4: Output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content (misleading headline claim).
